expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: developer smoke checklist is derived from P1 and analog-gate scenarios
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly addresses this: it cites `skill_snapshot/README.md` stating `context/developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md` is derived from P1 and `[ANALOG-GATE]` scenarios, and cites `skill_snapshot/scripts/lib/finalPlanSummary.mjs` where `extractDeveloperSmokeRows()` includes scenarios only if tagged `<P1>` or containing `[ANALOG-GATE]`, and writes `context/developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md`.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase7
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly checks Phase 7 alignment, citing `skill_snapshot/SKILL.md` Phase 7 contract (promotion to `qa_plan_final.md`, finalization record, final plan summary generation, explicit approval gate) and `finalPlanSummary.mjs` outputs including `context/final_plan_summary_<feature-id>.md` and `context/developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md`, which are Phase 7 artifacts.
